canonical_answer: A woman with blonde hair wearing a plaid shirt sits behind a light wooden table where a green and white Baby Bullet appliance stands on the left. Small glass jars with green lids and patterned ceramic cups are arranged in front of her. She handles various items including jars and a booklet while white curtains hang in the background.
